title: Interactive Brokers: Leaving Peers In The Dust
text: Interactive Brokers is an electronic broker that offers superior services compared to its competitors. IBKR has one of the lowest cost structures in the industry, enabling for higher margins than their peers. The company's client base is diversified and very active.

title: Interactive Brokers (IBKR) to Gain by Streamlining EU Business
text: With an aim to further strengthen operational efficiency, Interactive Brokers (IBKR) consolidates its EU operations.

title: Interactive Brokers Group Consolidates EU Operations into Ireland
text: GREENWICH, Conn. & DUBLIN--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Interactive Brokers Group (Nasdaq: IBKR), a leading global brokerage firm, today announced the consolidation of its European brokerage operations, with Interactive Brokers Central Europe (“IBCE”), based in Budapest Hungary, merging its client base and operations into the operations of Interactive Brokers Ireland (“IBIE”). The Group expects the merger of its European operations to produce measurable improvements in efficiency, while retaining its key t.

title: U.S. SEC nearing settlement with Wall Street firms over WhatsApp probe -sources
text: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) is finalizing settlements with around two dozen Wall Street firms to resolve investigations into record-keeping lapses, said two people with knowledge of the matter.

title: Interactive Brokers Expands Overnight Trading to Over 10,000 US Stocks and ETFs
text: GREENWICH, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Interactive Brokers (Nasdaq: IBKR) announced the expansion of its Overnight Trading Hours service, which now lists over 10,000 US stocks and ETFs.

title: Interactive Brokers (IBKR) Records Decline in August DARTs

title: IBKR Is Reasonably Priced Even In A ZIRP Environment
text: Contrary to cursory fears, IBKR earnings growth has been less volatile thanks to interest rate volatility! Despite being a high-quality business, IBKR is not in high demand by institutions due to perceived unpredictability of short-term results. The company's account growth has remained strong, surpassing historical levels, despite challenging market conditions of late.

title: Interactive Brokers Group Reports Brokerage Metrics and Other Financial Information for August 2023, includes Reg.-NMS Execution Statistics
text: GREENWICH, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $IBKR #IBKR--Interactive Brokers Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: IBKR) an automated global electronic broker, today reported its Electronic Brokerage monthly performance metrics for August. Brokerage highlights for the month included: 1.931 million Daily Average Revenue Trades (DARTs)1, 2% lower than prior year and 3% lower than prior month. Ending client equity of $377.6 billion, 22% higher than prior year and 2% lower than prior month. Ending client margin loan balances of $42.1 bi.
